# Morocco Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Morocco's administrative hierarchy:
> 10 regions, 69 provinces, 1,735 localitys.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 10
- Total provinces: 69
- Total localitys: 1,735
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-06-01
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-province.json)
- [All localitys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-localite.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Beni Mellal Khenifra](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/beni-mellal-khenifra-ma001/) — 5 provinces, 161 localitys
- [Casablanca Settat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/casablanca-settat-ma002/) — 9 provinces, 180 localitys
- [Draa Tafilalet](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/draa-tafilalet-ma003/) — 5 provinces, 167 localitys
- [Fez Meknes](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/fez-meknes-ma004/) — 9 provinces, 255 localitys
- [Guelmim Oued Noun](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/guelmim-oued-noun-ma005/) — 4 provinces, 59 localitys
- [Marrakech Safi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/marrakech-safi-ma006/) — 8 provinces, 271 localitys
- [Oriental](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/oriental-ma007/) — 8 provinces, 142 localitys
- [Rabat Sale Kenitra](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rabat-sale-kenitra-ma008/) — 7 provinces, 115 localitys
- [Souss Massa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/souss-massa-ma009/) — 6 provinces, 216 localitys
- [Tangier Tetouan Al Hoceima](https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tangier-tetouan-al-hoceima-ma010/) — 8 provinces, 169 localitys

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Beni Mellal Khenifra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/beni-mellal-khenifra-ma001.txt)
- [Casablanca Settat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/casablanca-settat-ma002.txt)
- [Draa Tafilalet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/draa-tafilalet-ma003.txt)
- [Fez Meknes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/fez-meknes-ma004.txt)
- [Guelmim Oued Noun](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/guelmim-oued-noun-ma005.txt)
- [Marrakech Safi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/marrakech-safi-ma006.txt)
- [Oriental](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/oriental-ma007.txt)
- [Rabat Sale Kenitra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/rabat-sale-kenitra-ma008.txt)
- [Souss Massa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/souss-massa-ma009.txt)
- [Tangier Tetouan Al Hoceima](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tangier-tetouan-al-hoceima-ma010.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (province), 3 (locality)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Morocco Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/morocco-administrative-divisions
